main.description: An AnchorHello package for E2EE session setup. Contains MLS KeyPackage(s), agent delegation data, and policy information, all signed by the Anchor Key declared in com.germnetwork.declaration. Models after Germ's current shipping 1:1 E2EE DM product.

version.description: Semver version number for the AnchorHello wire format

anchorHello.description: Opaque AnchorHello wire format: contains agent public key, MLS KeyPackage(s), succession proofs, and policy, signed by the Anchor Key

anchorSignature.description: The Anchor Key's signature over the AnchorHello, verifying the delegation from the DID's Anchor Key to the Hello Agent
